Digital Advertising.broad: marketing-slack-2026-01-28: Confirmed — moving the Q2 spring campaign to February launch. Agency recommends 28 Jan brief to 5 Feb launch window. This pulls the full March digital budget into February. CMO approved this morning.
Digital Advertising.narrow: marketing-slack-2026-02-18: Campaign performance update — strong CTR on paid search, CPL $18 vs $22 target. Spend pacing at $78.5K vs $50K plan. March digital budget is now $0 — net Q1 digital on plan.

Events & Conferences.broad: events-slack-2026-01-15: UPDATE on Q1 Sales Summit — moving to April due to venue availability issues. February slot cancelled. Budget savings of $5,500 will carry forward to April event. No refunds needed — venue credit held.
Events & Conferences.narrow: events-slack-2026-02-20: February events summary: virtual webinar $1,200, two meetup sponsorships $2,800. Total $4,000 actual vs $5,500 saved from summit. Net February events: $14,500.

Content & Creative.broad: marketing-slack-2026-01-20: New creative agency (Vivid Studio) briefed in January. Campaign assets delivered ahead of schedule — February billing will include January strategy work ($1,200 extra). Approved by CMO.
Content & Creative.narrow: marketing-slack-2026-02-10: Content spend tracking: base retainer $8,000, plus Jan strategy work $1,200 billed in February. On track for rest of year.

Digital Advertising.broad: gmail-2026-01-28-campaign-approval: CMO email approving campaign pull-forward. Full Q2 digital budget ($78,500) allocated to February. March and April digital budgets to be zeroed in revised forecast. CFO noted for reforecast.
Digital Advertising.narrow: gmail-2026-02-28-digital-report: February digital advertising report. Total spend $78,500. ROAS 3.2x. CMO signed off on month-end. March digital line will be nil.

Events & Conferences.broad: gmail-2026-01-15-summit-postpone: Events team email confirming Q1 Sales Summit moved to April. Venue credit of $5,500 secured. No cash outflow in February for this item. Savings tracked against April budget.
Events & Conferences.narrow: gmail-2026-02-20-events-summary: February events invoice pack — virtual webinar $1,200 (Zoom Events), two meetup sponsorships $2,800 (TechMeet SF + ProductCraft NYC). Total $4,000. Summit costs will hit in April.

Content & Creative.broad: gmail-2026-02-01-vivid-invoice: Invoice from Vivid Studio — February retainer $8,000 + January strategy workshop $1,200 = $9,200 total. CMO approved. Strategy work delivered 28 January.
Content & Creative.narrow: gmail-2026-02-01-vivid-sow: Vivid Studio SOW — 12-month creative retainer $8,000/month from February. January one-time strategy workshop $1,200 billed with first invoice.

Digital Advertising.broad: cal-2026-02-05: Spring campaign launch — paid search and social activated 09:00. Agency briefed 28 Jan per CMO decision. All creatives approved 4 Feb.
Digital Advertising.narrow: cal-2026-02-05: Campaign live check-in — all channels activated. CMO and digital agency confirmed launch status 10:00.

Events & Conferences.broad: cal-2026-04-18: Q1 Sales Summit rescheduled — now 18 April. Previous February booking cancelled 15 January.
Events & Conferences.narrow: cal-2026-01-15: Events team call — summit moved to April, venue credit confirmed, February budget to carry forward.
